properties.name: i2cAddress
properties.description: I2C address of the PCF8574 backpack (typical: 0x27 or 0x3F)

components.$comment: I2C-backpack variant of LCD1602: reuses the wokwi-lcd1602 web component but renders the 4-pin I2C header (GND/VCC/SDA/SCL) instead of the parallel 16-pin header. ProtocolParts registers the matching HD44780 + PCF8574 decoder so Arduino sketches using LiquidCrystal_I2C work out of the box.

components.$comment: Picker shortcut for SSD1306 in I2C mode — same wokwi-ssd1306 element, but the user finds it by name without having to discover the protocol selector on the generic ssd1306 entry. Issue #101.

DHT11 Module
components.description: DHT11 temperature and humidity module. Uses DHT single-wire timing with DHT11 ranges and controls.

components.name: LM35DZ Temperature Sensor
components.description: Analog LM35DZ temperature sensor. OUT voltage is 10mV per degree Celsius.
components.thumbnail: <svg width="64" height="64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="12" y="14" width="40" height="36" rx="6" fill="#2546a0"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="10" fill="#dbeafe"/><text x="32" y="35" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" font-weight="800" fill="#1e3a8a">LM35</text></svg>

components.name: Water Level Module
components.description: Analog water level sensor module. Sensor controls set the detected level and drive the S pin voltage.

components.name: RC522 RFID Module
components.description: MFRC522-compatible SPI RFID module with starter-kit pinout. Provides a simulated card-present state and fixed UID for sketches that poll the module.
